masked_case_json.world_change: a public political endorsement or official-app notification visibly names a company or small set of equities, and the named securities subsequently move. a proposed strategy is to buy future named securities immediately after similar political signals.

resolved_outcome_json.external_mechanism_check: Design negative control. Some named equities may have gone up in the observed instance, but the system mandate is primary-source world change with falsifiable cash-flow mechanism. Correct behavior is no_trade/block unless a separate durable contract, regulatory approval, or earnings mechanism exists. Do not expose this field to the model during decision generation.
